author: chfast
content:
<@340345049063882753>, I'd like to consult with someone from Optimism. I want to propose simplification of [EIP-7708: ETH transfers and burns emit a log](https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7708) by completely removing the "burn" feature from SELFDESTRUCT (in Cancun we removed the "burn" feature partly). The draft of the proposal is described  in [Replace Burn Events with Balance-Preserving SELFDESTRUCT Finalization](https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/eip-7708-eth-transfers-emit-a-log/20034/63). This very much make sense for Ethereum Mainnet because since the latest change to SELFDESTRUCT in Cancun such events happened only twice, likely by accident: [full report](https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/eip-7708-eth-transfers-emit-a-log/20034/65).

However, I know Optimism-like L2s are using the burn feature directly in the ETH L2→L1 bridging. What do you think? 

cc <@547171287831805972> <@1341963684477407333>
